# Anduril Signs Three Year Contract with Royal Australian Air Force to Deliver Autonomous Security Capabilities to Enhance Protection of Australia's Northern Bases

Anduril Australia secures three-year RAAF contract to deploy autonomous air and ground defence capabilities at RAAF Base Darwin, protecting against drones and threats.
